parents.subject: LU-16655 build: add wirecheck/wiretest for disk structs

commit.subject: LU-16641 quota: reset edquot regardless qunit
commit.message:
LU-16641 quota: reset edquot regardless qunit

it can happen that remaining ungranted space is less than qunit.
in this case qmt_adjust_edquot() doesn't reset edquot so that
remaining space becomes "ungrantable".

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=ldiskfs testlist=sanity-quota,sanity-quota,sanity-quota
Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=zfs testlist=sanity-quota,sanity-quota,sanity-quota
Signed-off-by: Alex Zhuravlev <bzzz@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2204939386c7d1196b2830bd2e848c6d040851ac
